basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Dr Cash $180 / Cr Issued capital $100 / Cr Share premium $80 matches expected; Issued capital = Share capital--Common, Share premium = APIC (IFRS naming)

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Dr Deferred income $100 / Cr Revenue from rendering of services $100 matches expected Dr Contract liabilities / Cr Revenue; Deferred income = Contract liabilities (IFRS variant)

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Dr Treasury shares $200 / Cr Cash and cash equivalents $200 matches expected exactly

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Dr Employee benefits expense $100 / Cr Cash $100 matches expected Dr Salaries expense / Cr Cash; Employee benefits expense is the IFRS equivalent of Salaries expense
